headline: Hook perf cleanup — every hook starts faster

bullets: lib/hook-utils.sh hook_init: collapsed 4-5 separate jq calls into one; bash+jq startup floor dropped ~10ms across every hook invocation.
lib/detection-registry.sh: replaced base64 round-trip with SOH sentinel; saves ~130ms per dispatcher startup (grouped-bash-guard, grouped-read-guard).
lib/settings-permissions.sh: inlined pure-expansion helpers that were forking 90 subshells per load; approve-safe-commands and auto-mode-shared-steps run ~190ms faster.
lib/hook-utils.sh: hooks invoked manually from a TTY no longer hang on stdin (skip the cat read when stdin is a terminal).
